case_title: CORY SCOTT PATTERSON VS. JULIO C. SALGADO

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED SERVED APR-15-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SALGADO, JULIO C.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-28-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-28-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. MATTER WAS ON CALENDAR FOR A PROGRESS REPORT, AND WILL BE CONTINUED, NOTHING ON RECORD. CASE SETTLED. (TELEPHONE STANDBY OK FOR PLAINTIFF IF DEFENDANT IS NOTIFIED AT LEAST A WEEK AHEAD OF TIME.) CLERK-BETH WILBER, 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-04-2009 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO SEP-03-2009 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. CONTINUED IN 3 MONTH INTERVALS UNTIL JANUARY, 2011 PER THE COURT ORDER OF MAY 29, 2008. NO APPEARANCES. JUDGE PRO TEM: MARK SCHREIBER. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER GRANTING REQUEST FOR TELEPHONIC APPEARANCE, FILED. COPY SENT TO PLAINTIFF WITH INSTRUCTIONS FOR TELEPHONIC APPEARANCE.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,500.00 FILED BY PATTERSON, CORY SCOTT AS TO DEFENDANT SALGADO, JULIO C. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-29-2008 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
RETURN OF CONTINUANCE ORDER - SENT TO CORY SCOTT PATTERSON

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-04-2008 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAR-05-2009 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. CONTINUED PER THE COURT ORDER OF MAY 30, 2008. NO APPEARANCE BY EITHER PARTY. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-21-2010 IS OFF CALENDAR. NO APPEARANCES. JUDGE PRO TEM: DEBORAH DANILOFF. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-05-2009 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JUN-04-2009 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT EVERY 3 MONTHS UNTIL JANUARY, 2011 PER COURT ORDER OF MAY 29, 2008. NO APPEARANCE BY EITHER PARTY. JUDGE PRO TEM: QUEENA C. HO. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-29-2008 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES TO AUG-28-2008 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PROGRESS REPORTS SHALL BE SCHEDULED EVERY THREE MONTHS. IF PLAINTIFF DESIRES TO APPEAR, PLAINTIFF SHALL NOTIFY THE COURT AND DEFENDANT ONE WEEK IN ADVANCE, AND MAY ARRANGE TO APPEAR TELEPHONICALLY. THE LAST PROGRESS REPORT SHALL BE SCHEDULED FOR AFTER JANUARY 11, 2011 AND IF NO PARTIES APPEAR AT THE LAST DATE, THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-28-2008 - CONTINUED FOR A FURTHER PROGRESS REPORT TO DEC-04-2008 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 (CLERK-BETH WILBER, 506)
CONTINUANCE ORDER RETURNED UNDELIVERED. SENT TO DEFENDANT.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-03-2009 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO DEC-03-2009 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. CONTINUE IN 3 MONTH INTERVALS UNTIL JANUARY 2010. NO APPEARANCES. JUDGE PRO TEM: BRAD KAPLAN. CLERK: S. VANTREE. OT REPORTED. (506)
PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR FOR TELEPHONIC APPEARANCE, FILED.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-03-2009 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO JAN-21-2010 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF APPEARS BY TELEPHONE. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: MONICA F. WILEY. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
COPYING FEES PAID BY PLAINTIFF PATTERSON, CORY SCOTT
